title: Senior Teacher - Chandigarh University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Chandigarh University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Chandigarh University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Chandigarh University:
Chandigarh University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
